hooks.command:
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then large=$(find . -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' -size +50M 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$large" ]; then echo "⚠️ 发现大文件 (>50MB)，推送前请处理："; echo "$large" | while read f; do ls -lh "$f" 2>/dev/null; done; echo "
建议：添加到 .gitignore 或配置 Git LFS"; exit 1; fi; fi
